docket_entries.description: SC-109 - AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [DAN MCDOWELL - APPEARING ON BEHALF OF AIRBNB, INC.] FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ARVIND REDDY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL (REPRESENTATIVE). DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION FROM SEP-12-2022 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON SEP-12-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES MAY APPEAR BY ZOOM. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. / W. TRUPEK NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. [HEARING ORIGINALLY SET FOR: SEPTEMBER 12, 2022 AT 6:30PM] **HEARING TIME ADVANCED TO 3:30PM**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30) SERVED JUL-20-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDDY, ARVIND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. $634.72 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $739.72 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY REDDY, ARVIND AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2022 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
